summary: The AI agent failed to engage with the patient effectively, resulting in an abrupt call termination without addressing the patient's request for an appointment.

issues.title: Call Termination Without Engagement
issues.details: The agent abruptly ended the call without responding to the patient's request for a routine check-up appointment. This is a significant failure as it does not fulfill the scenario goal of scheduling an appointment.
issues.expected: The agent should have acknowledged the patient's request, asked for any necessary information, and proceeded to schedule the appointment.
